# The Social Seen

> A curated social events platform for London professionals in their 30s–40s. We connect people through handpicked experiences — supper clubs, gallery openings, wine tastings, cultural soirées, networking, and more.

## About

The Social Seen is London's premier social community for professionals who believe the best moments are experienced together. We curate intimate events designed to spark genuine connections — quality over scale, curation over open-door.

Membership is invite-driven. Every member is here because someone vouched for them. The community grew from a WhatsApp group of friends to 1,000+ professionals over the last few years.

## Pages

- [Home](https://thesocialseen.com): Landing page with featured upcoming events, member testimonials, and community overview.
- [Events](https://thesocialseen.com/events): Full listing of upcoming, published events with category filters.
- [Past Events](https://thesocialseen.com/events/past): Archive of recent gatherings with member reviews and photos — useful for prospective members getting a feel for the community.
- [Gallery](https://thesocialseen.com/gallery): Photo gallery from past events.
- [About](https://thesocialseen.com/about): Story behind The Social Seen and the values that shape how we run events.
- [Contact](https://thesocialseen.com/contact): Get in touch with the team — general questions, event enquiries, press.
- [Collaborate](https://thesocialseen.com/collaborate): Brand, venue, and sponsor partnership pitches.
- [Join](https://thesocialseen.com/join): Membership registration.
- [Privacy Policy](https://thesocialseen.com/privacy): How we collect, use, and protect personal data under UK GDPR.
- [Terms of Service](https://thesocialseen.com/terms): Membership terms and platform use.

## Social

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/the_social_seen

## Event Categories

drinks, dining, cultural, wellness, sport, workshops, music, networking

## Contact

For enquiries: info@the-social-seen.com or visit [thesocialseen.com](https://thesocialseen.com).

## Crawling Notes

Public surfaces (pages above) are open to indexing. Member-only routes (/profile, /bookings), admin tooling (/admin/*), API endpoints (/api/*), and authentication flows (/verify, /forgot-password, /reset-password, /account-suspended) are excluded via robots.txt.
